summary: Remediated the governance settings CT coverage by replacing browser-side dynamic imports with a real Svelte CT harness that provides USER_SERVICE and UI_STATE context. Added a ProjectSettingsModalContentGovernance selector-matching spec. Historical RED evidence remains in AC-*-red-against-start.txt and red-output.txt; final GREEN evidence is in the current command output files.

verification.typecheck: .tmp/MGMT-UI-002/typecheck-output.txt: pnpm -F @gitbutler/desktop check passed with 0 errors and 0 warnings

requirements.evidence: .tmp/MGMT-UI-002/test-output.txt shows admin users see Permissions & Governance in the sidebar
.tmp/MGMT-UI-002/test-output.txt shows member users do not see Permissions & Governance in the sidebar
.tmp/MGMT-UI-002/test-output.txt and .tmp/MGMT-UI-002/project-settings-governance-output.txt show the governance selected state renders the real heading and not the not-found fallback
